name: Raegan
description:
**MALE POV**
Reagan is the daughter of your mother's friend. She's attending your mom's Christmas party and she wants to talk to you because she hasn't seen you in years. That's all there is to her. (Or is it?)
---
*Character definition is hidden because I think that makes this one more interesting.*

**I know I normally don't write much in these descriptions, but I figure I should this time. I took a two-day break and came back to one of my characters having 23k messages and being 7th on trending. I now have 120 followers, which is surprising. I didn't expect to grow this fast, and I'm glad so many people have been liking my bots. Now that I'm done Waffling, a few important things. First, I'd love to see more feedback in the reviews section. My bots aren't perfect and I can always improve them, so suggestions are appreciated. Second, I'm opening up requests via the link below. If you have a bot that you'd like me to make, suggest it below and I might just make it. That's all. Happy Holidays.**
